student.title: Student Progress
student.description: Represents a student's active progress, quiz answers, and draft chapters in the interactive workbook.

certificate.title: Certificate Delivery
certificate.description: Represents certificates requested or delivered to students upon completion of all sprints.

adminConfig.title: Admin Google Sheets Link Configuration
adminConfig.description: Stores the spreadsheet link for the professor to sync student metrics onto Google Sheets.

/students/{studentId}.description: Student progress documents keyed by user UID.

/certificates/{certificateId}.description: Certificate records issued to completing students.

/adminConfig/{configId}.description: Master administration configurations (Google Sheet spreadsheetId, etc.)
